title: Thoughtbox PR Description
description: Machine-readable PR description. Required for every PR targeting main. Claims reference spec frontmatter as spec_id:claim_id (e.g. SPEC-CONTROL-PLANE:c1). Legacy adrs/adr_claim_id fields remain supported during migration.

branch.description: Exact git branch name for this PR

specs.description: Spec IDs implemented by this PR (from spec frontmatter spec_id). Empty if no spec applies.

adrs.description: DEPRECATED — use specs. ADR IDs during migration only.

summary.description: One paragraph: what changed and why

claims.description: One entry per claim being made about this PR's correctness.

id.description: Claim identifier, unique within this PR description

spec_claim_id.description: References spec frontmatter as spec_id:claim_id. Use '__none__' if this PR has no spec claim.

adr_claim_id.description: DEPRECATED — use spec_claim_id during migration only.

statement.description: What is being claimed — should match or directly implement the spec claim statement

evidence_type.description: How this claim is verified. Behavioral spec claims require agentic_test or human_attestation.

evidence_path.description: Path to the file, test, or log that constitutes the evidence

evidence_description.description: Plain-language description of what the evidence shows

attestation.description: Required if any claim uses evidence_type: human_attestation

attested_by.description: Who attested — use 'human' for manual verification by the repo owner
